name: Loops
description: Email marketing platform for SaaS. Send transactional and marketing emails, manage contacts, trigger event-based automations, and organize mailing lists.

capabilities.name: contacts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contact in Loops with email and custom properties.

capabilities.name: contacts_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing contact's properties in Loops.

capabilities.name: contacts_find
capabilities.description: Find a contact by email address.

capabilities.name: contacts_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a contact from Loops by email or user ID.

capabilities.name: contact_properties_create
capabilities.description: Create a new custom contact property.

capabilities.name: contact_properties_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all custom contact properties.

capabilities.name: mailing_lists_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all mailing lists.

capabilities.name: events_send
capabilities.description: Send an event to trigger automations for a contact.

capabilities.name: transactional_send
capabilities.description: Send a transactional email using a pre-built template.

capabilities.name: transactional_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all transactional email templates.

capabilities.name: api_key_test
capabilities.description: Test if the API key is valid and working.
